response.justification: The candidate substantially exceeds the 6+ years requirement with nearly two decades of fullstack experience spanning TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS, and Kubernetes, plus current hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling — a rare and explicitly required skill. A strong testing and software craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, workshops, authored test libraries) aligns well with the quality-focused responsibilities. Gaps are mostly around specific framework matches (Nest.js, Vitest not explicitly listed) and limited Kotlin/Java depth, but these are learnable given the demonstrated polyglot track record.
strengths: Deep fullstack TypeScript/Node.js/React experience across multiple senior roles, plus cloud (AWS, Kubernetes, Docker)
Current AI-agent development experience, including MCP code generators and agentic-workflow frameworks
Strong testing culture: TDD practitioner, authored testing libraries, ran testing workshops and courses
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience, the primary backend framework in the stack
Kotlin/Java exposure is limited and dated; Python not mentioned at all
Significant career time invested in D language, a niche skill with less direct relevance to this stack

key_factors.factor: Missing Nest.js and weak Kotlin/Java coverage
